goal: Logged-out daily streak chip: show the local streak + a 'Save your fortune' sign-in CTA
done: renderStreakChip() now branches on getCurrentUserSync(): signed-in shows '<n> day streak' (or 'Start your streak' at 0); signed-OUT shows the local streak number + label 'Save your fortune' / 'บันทึกดวงของคุณ' (new dailyStreakSaveCta i18n key, EN/TH) and makes the chip a tappable CTA (role=button, tabindex, Enter/Space) opening the sign-in gate (showSignInGate -> loginWithProvider('google')). Rationale: local streaks are fragile (cache-clear, no cross-device) so logged-out users see what they built + a loss-aversion nudge. css/daily.css: .is-cta { cursor:pointer }.
verified: Local (chrome-devtools, cache-busted): logged-out streak=7 -> '7' + 'Save your fortune', is-cta + role=button; tap opens sign-in gate (mt-signin-overlay is-visible).
